nasb.text: ‘No layman, however, is to eat the holy gift; a sojourner with the priest or a hired man shall not eat of the holy gift.

esv.text: “A lay person shall not eat of a holy thing; no foreign guest of the priest or hired worker shall eat of a holy thing,

cnv.text: “所有外族人都不可吃聖物；寄居在祭司家裡的人或是受雇的雇工，都不可吃聖物。

ccb.text: “只有祭司一家可以吃圣物，在祭司家中寄居的或做雇工的都不可吃，
